architecture_fit.note: Plain softmax attention with no minimax mechanism; at alpha=0 it collapses onto the spurious distractor (max weight 0.53) — the exact failure the goal asks to avoid.

baseline_comparison.note: Only the benchmark's built-in linear baseline exists; lift_over_linear is a marginal 0.036 and no deliberate strawman comparison is shown.

faithfulness.note: No ablation or causal check; README claims a hard-coded uniform mechanism that is entirely absent from main.py.

operating_range.note: Sweeps alpha 0-1 but regret stays high (0.20-0.38) across the range and worsens with alpha; no robustness demonstrated.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: README claims hard-coded uniform weights but the code implements none — no genuine hand-set circuit exists.

visual_judgement.note: Demo tab is a literal placeholder Markdown string; there is no visualisation of attention weights at all.

visualisation_rationale.note: README describes bar charts and entropy/KL subplots that do not exist in app.py — rationale for an unimplemented viz.

notes: The attempt's main.py is vanilla scaled dot-product softmax attention with no minimax mechanism, and at the canonical alpha=0 it collapses onto the spuriously-similar distractor (max weight 0.53, regret 0.20) — the precise behavior the goal asks the head to avoid. The README fabricates a hard-coded uniform mechanism and describes bar-chart/entropy visualisations, none of which exist; app.py's Demo tab is a bare placeholder. Method, faithfulness, and visualisation all fail.
